title: 2x Pan Aroma Plug In Air Freshener Tangerine & Vanilla – Bundled by GetInStyle Shop
features: LONG-LASTING DUAL-SCENT AIR FRESHENING -- Enjoy a bright, uplifting citrus note of tangerine paired with a smooth vanilla undertone that revitalizes indoor spaces for weeks per insert.
EFFORTLESS, CONTINUOUS FRAGRANCE -- Plug-in design delivers a steady release of aroma without smoke or sprays, providing consistent fragrance coverage across rooms.
USER-FRIENDLY AND MESS-FREE -- Easy-to-install plug-in units with secure, refillable cartridges; designed to minimize drips and spills while maintaining a clean, uncluttered look.
VALUE PACK FOR MULTIPLE ROOMS -- Pack of 2 units in a classic white finish, ideal for refreshing two rooms or replacing both units at once for uniform scent distribution.
Package contents: Pan Aroma Plug In Air Freshener - Tangerine & Vanilla Scents, Pack of 2. The actual packaging may vary.
description: Pan Aroma Plug In Air Freshener (Tangerine & Vanilla, White, Pack of 2) delivers an enduring dual-fragrance experience that combines bright citrus with a smooth vanilla base to refresh living spaces. Each unit provides a steady, hassle-free scent release through a plug-in design, eliminating the need for sprays or candles while maintaining a consistent aroma distribution across rooms. The easy installation and clean, drip-free cartridges ensure a tidy setup that blends with modern interiors, with a white, unobtrusive aesthetic that complements any decor. This value pack includes two plug-ins, making it convenient to refresh multiple rooms or replace both units simultaneously for uniform fragrance coverage. Designed for prolonged use, the fragrance cartridges are engineered for long-lasting performance, offering weeks of fragrant ambiance per insert.
